projectDescription: A full-stack library management system built with pure PHP that provides secure authentication, book catalog CRUD, loan tracking, and role-based access control for administrators and standard readers.
keyFeatures: Secure login with brute-force protection (15-minute lockout after 3 failures)
CSRF token protection on all forms and critical actions
BCrypt password hashing via PHP's PASSWORD_BCRYPT
SQL injection prevention with PDO prepared statements and XSS sanitization
Complete CRUD for book catalog with availability status tracking
Loan management with date tracking and status workflow (Pending, Confirmed, Cancelled)
Password recovery via PHPMailer with time-limited single-use tokens (1 hour TTL)
Responsive dark-mode UI for authentication screens with hamburger menu on mobile
publicApiSurface: recover.php — Password recovery request via email (POST)
modules/usuarios_form.php — Staff user create/edit form (admin only)
